message:
refactor(sync): improve channel and sync primitive cancel-safety

Channel modules (broadcast, mpsc, oneshot, watch):
- Improve cancel-safety of send/receive operations
- Better integration with two-phase permit model
- Enhanced error handling and diagnostics

Sync modules (barrier, mutex, notify, once_cell, rwlock, semaphore):
- Improve async mutex and rwlock implementations
- Better cancellation handling for waiters
- Enhanced semaphore permit tracking

These primitives are foundational to asupersync's correctness guarantees,
ensuring that cancellation cannot cause data loss in concurrent code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
